steps.title: Use the contrast signal
steps.content: The sentence first says the absence of Mammillaria in eastern and western Coahuila has been blamed on unsuitable habitat. The word “but” introduces a challenge: much of the area is hard to access.

steps.title: Reject unsupported explanations
steps.content: Choice A invents confusion with a similar species. Choice B concerns overestimating the number of species throughout Mexico. Choice D restates the habitat explanation that the “but” clause is challenging.

steps.title: Connect access and absence
steps.content: The remaining choice explains that the apparent absence may result from insufficient exploration of an inaccessible region, not from unsuitable habitat. The answer is C.
